presentation.latex: for n nodes. A trajectory τ = ( s0, a0), ....(sn, an) can be generated de novo from s0 by sampling actions a from a conditional policy PF (. | c; θ), or by “deconstructing” a molecular graph G = sn via PB(. | c; θ). States si are partially constructed subgraphs, albeit we ensure that they remain valid molecular graphs throughout.
